name: Onion Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine in a saucepan.
2. Add onions and stir until well coated with butter.
3. Cook over medium heat until golden brown throughout.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: eggs, milk, salt, pepper, nutmeg or curry powder.
5. Mix the egg mixture into the onions.
6. Pour the custard into a buttered 1-quart casserole dish.
7. Bake uncovered for 25-30 minutes at 275 degrees F, or until set like a custard.
